intro.title: FAQ
intro.description: These are the questions buyers ask before they trust a new supplier. If you do not see yours here, send it and we will answer directly.

items.question: What's your MOQ?
items.answer: MOQ depends on product type and customization depth. Share your target SKU and sales channel, and we will propose a practical MOQ that supports your launch.

items.question: Can I get samples before placing an order?
items.answer: Yes. We offer stock samples for quick evaluation and branded samples for private-label validation.

items.question: What is your typical lead time?
items.answer: Lead time depends on customization, quantity, and documentation needs. We can provide a sampling plan and a mass production schedule aligned to your launch date.

items.question: Do you support OEM/ODM projects?
items.answer: Yes. We support everything from logo + packaging to structural customization and project-based molds.

items.question: Do you provide CE/RoHS/FCC documentation?
items.answer: We support documentation and labeling planning based on product type and destination market requirements. Tell us where you will sell and what marks your channel requires.

items.question: How do you ensure batch consistency?
items.answer: Through material control, process checkpoints (IQC/IPQC/FQC), and revision control so repeat orders stay consistent.

items.question: What's your warranty policy?
items.answer: Warranty depends on product category and destination market. We align inspection standards and provide practical support to reduce claims.

items.question: What payment terms do you accept?
items.answer: Common options include T/T and other terms depending on project type and order history. We confirm terms during RFQ.

items.question: Can you do custom packaging and barcodes?
items.answer: Yes. We support private label packaging, inserts, barcodes, and QR instruction cards for e-commerce and retail.

items.question: How do you handle quality issues?
items.answer: We rely on evidence, traceability, and root-cause analysis. Practical solutions can include replacement, credit, or corrective actions as agreed.

items.question: Can you ship to my forwarder or provide DDP?
items.answer: We can ship to your forwarder and support common Incoterms (EXW/FOB/CIF). DDP options can be discussed by destination and order size.

items.question: Can you help with product photos?
items.answer: We can provide clean product and packaging photos. Share your platform requirements and we will confirm what's available.

primary.title: Still Have a Question? Request a Quote
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
